name: Attractor
description: Strange attractors: chaotic dynamic systems visualization

global_xyz._role: PERSISTENT shared agent state (allocated by pointsEmit upstream; this effect declares textures:{} and only reads/writes it). Layout [x,y,z,alive_flag]. Double-buffered/ping-ponged across frames (reference 04 §10.7 isStateSurface matches the 'xyz' suffix => PERSIST, not swap). rgba32f (full float) to hold attractor-space positions far outside [0,1].

global_vel._role: PERSISTENT shared agent state (allocated by pointsEmit upstream). Layout [vx,vy,vz,seed]. Read+written unchanged by the agent pass (momentum carrier). Persists via isStateSurface 'vel' suffix.

global_rgba._role: PERSISTENT shared agent state (allocated by pointsEmit upstream). Layout [r,g,b,a] agent color. Read+written unchanged by the agent pass. Persists via isStateSurface 'rgba' suffix.

feedback._comment: Multi-pass agent sim. State lives in three PERSISTENT shared 'global_' surfaces global_xyz/global_vel/global_rgba (allocated by pointsEmit upstream; this effect's textures:{} is empty in definition.js — the entries above are documented for parity, NOT pooled, NOT '_'-prefixed transient). Pass 1 'agent' is a FULLSCREEN MRT state update (drawBuffers:3) that reads + writes all three globals in ONE pass (SV_Target0/1/2 = outXYZ/outVel/outRGBA, attachment slots in outputs{} insertion order). The runtime ping-pongs each global per write (ref 04 §10.2) and persists final bindings at end-of-frame via isStateSurface (xyz/vel/rgba suffix match => PERSIST, not swap; §10.7). Pass 2 'passthrough' is a plain fullscreen copy of the 2D inputTex to outputTex. There is NO deposit / drawMode:'points' / scatter pass and NO diffuse pass in THIS effect — the points-scatter 1px deposit + render happen downstream in the separate pointsRender effect. No iteration uniform is injected (no repeat). MRT: true (agent pass only).
